sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) whiteness, transparency, Exo 24:10.

(2) [Libnah], pr.n.-(a) of a town in the plain country, of the tribe of Judah; a royal city of the Canaanites, afterwards a city of the priests and a city of refuge, Jos 10:29 12:15 15:42 21:13 2Ki 8:22 19:8 23:31 .-(b) of a station of the Israelites in the desert, Num 33:20.
